name: Barb Petit
body: My son, Tod Petit, and his wife Doreen, stopped in today, and shared your difficult, and wonderful story. I don't even know you folks, but it brought tears of joy, for you all, and love for our Heavenly Father. May He continue to be by your side, and Bless you with His Love and Goodness. Lyla, you have such a beautiful heart! May God continue to Bless you. You are in my prayers. Mrs. Petit

name: Michelle Turkstra
body: Joining you in gratitude! Thanks for the updates and I will continue to pray. 💗

name: Nancy Rapaszky
body: Loved reading this hopeful beautiful update. Thanking God.

name: Charlie Pagnard
body: What a testimony! Lyla is a special girl bringing tears and support to all of us! May we all be more like her!!

name: Julie Hickman
body: Glorious story. We are so glad to hear the improvements and healing. Thanks Lee for sharing your daddy’s heart. Lyla is being used by Gid to touch people ALL over .

name: Lisa Daniel
body: I’m thankful that the Lord has blessed you and your family with this path of recovery. I will continue to pray for y’all.
